analyst_briefing: CRISIS regime VERY HIGH conviction confirmed: system_average -0.686, all 8 asset classes BEARISH/MILD NEGATIVE (Energy/EM Equities/Consumer Staples -0.87/-0.87/-0.78 worst). SA signals dominant: FOMC Apr 29 hold = policy paralysis (inflation >2% + growth risk); Hormuz 5-10 ships/day sustains energy shock (Brent $104, CPI energy +12.5%); tariff rung 3 (11.8% rate, 76 new Section 301 probes, pharma 100% Sep); fiscal $9.8T wall/$1T interest locks Bonds -0.68 HIGH. TS noise limited (fx_swap ELEVATED normalizing). Blind spots active (M2 real negative, earnings Q1 pre-tariff). Tail risks: tariff pharma escalation (0.75x0.85, ERM), Treasury snap (0.65x0.90 non-consensus). US SA (Fed/fiscal) aligns non-US (IMF EM dn, Hormuz); no divergence. Flags: ERM HIGH commodity multi-shock, SCEM MEDIUM EM sovereign stress. No regime change; 3+ SA corroboration met. MATT div: markets price 2-3 Fed cuts vs zero justified.
